title: polypodium ellipticum var. pothifolium
intro: Polypodium ellipticum var. pothifolium, also known as the Elliptical Polypody, is a type of fern that belongs to the Polypodiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Polypodium ellipticum var. pothifolium include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. The plant is often prepared as a herbal decoction or tea, and can also be used in poultices and salves to topical application of its medicinal properties.
